title: Linear MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Linear MCP Server for Claude
Integrate with Linear's issue tracking and project management system
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Linear
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `project-management` `linear` `issues` `tasks` `agile`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status linear
```

## Config
```json
{
  "linear": {
    "url": "https://mcp.linear.app/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status linear

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/linear-mcp-server
- https://linear.app/docs/mcp
